ports.purpose: HTTPS upload API, did:web discovery, revocation, receipts, and service manifest

manifest.notes: The ucan-store image prebakes local-storacha-api plus web/package-lock dependencies into the Aleph guest, keeps the raw upload API on internal port 8787, exposes a temporary setup endpoint on port 80, and serves the public upload API through the shared ucan-store request guard and Caddy on port 443. Public Helia/libp2p gateway exposure is intentionally not part of this base profile.
